faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our services, processes, and work methods.

items.q: How does the development process work?
items.a: Our process follows 4 stages: 1) Briefing and requirements analysis, 2) Prototyping and design, 3) Development with weekly sprints, 4) Testing, adjustments, and delivery. You follow everything in real time.

items.q: How long does it take to develop a project?
items.a: It depends on complexity. A landing page takes 5 to 10 days. A complete web system can take 4 to 12 weeks. After the briefing, we provide a detailed timeline.
We accept bank transfer (SWIFT), PayPal, and credit card. For larger projects, we split into installments tied to each stage delivery.

items.q: Do you offer support after delivery?
items.a: Yes! All projects include 30 days of free support after delivery. We also offer monthly maintenance plans for continuous updates.

items.q: Can the scope be changed during the project?
items.a: Yes, we work with agile methodology. Scope changes are evaluated and, if necessary, we adjust the timeline and budget together with the client.
Yes! We develop mobile apps using React Native, which allows creating apps for iOS and Android with a single codebase, reducing costs and time.

items.q: How does the contract model work?
items.a: We work with a service agreement that details scope, timeline, values, and conditions. Everything is transparent and aligned before the start.

items.q: Can I follow the project progress?
items.a: Yes! We provide access to a tracking dashboard and hold weekly alignment meetings to ensure everything is on track.
Yes! We serve clients worldwide. Our team works across multiple time zones and communicates in Portuguese, English, and Spanish.
We accept international payments via bank transfer (SWIFT), PayPal, and credit card in USD, EUR, and BRL. Budgets can be presented in your preferred currency.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as name, email, phone, and messages sent through the contact form. We also automatically collect browsing data such as IP address, browser type, and pages visited.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your data to: respond to your contact requests, send commercial proposals, improve our services, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 3. Cookies
sections.content: We use essential cookies for website functionality and analytical cookies to understand how visitors interact with our site. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time.

sections.title: 4. Your Rights (LGPD)
sections.content: Under the General Data Protection Law (Law No. 13,709/2018), you have the right to: access, correct, delete your personal data, revoke consent, and request data portability.

sections.title: 5. Security
sections.content: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or destruction. We use SSL encryption and secure data storage.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: For questions about this policy, please contact us.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using the website, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any term, we recommend not using the site.

sections.title: 2. Services
sections.content: We offer software development, website creation, mobile apps, automations, and AI solutions. Specific details of each project are defined in individual contracts.

sections.title: 3. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All website content, including texts, images, logos, and design, is our property and protected by intellectual property laws. Reproduction without authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: 4. User Responsibilities
sections.content: The user agrees to provide truthful information in the contact form and not to use the site for illegal or unauthorized purposes.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: We are not responsible for indirect damages arising from the use of the site. The information presented is for informational purposes and does not constitute a binding offer.

sections.title: 6. Jurisdiction
sections.content: The court of São Paulo/SP is elected to resolve any issues related to these Terms of Use.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: Questions about these terms? Contact us.

services.title: Websites & Landing Pages
services.subtitle: Sites that convert visitors into customers
services.heroDescription: We create high-performance websites and landing pages optimized for SEO and conversion. Modern design, ultra-fast loading, and flawless experience on any device.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: A website is your company's digital storefront — often the first contact potential clients will have with your brand. At UniveSIA, we believe every pixel matters and that design and performance go hand in hand.
Our websites are built with the most modern technologies (React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS) ensuring exceptional loading speed, native SEO, and a delightful user experience.
We offer everything from simple, direct landing pages for marketing campaigns to complete corporate portals with multiple pages, integrated blog, client area, and admin dashboards.
Each project is preceded by a complete analysis of your business, target audience, and competition, so the final result is not just beautiful but strategically effective.

advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.intro: Discover what makes our websites stand out:

items.title: Exceptional Performance
items.description: Sites loading in under 1 second using advanced optimization, code splitting, and lazy loading techniques.

items.title: Native SEO
items.description: Every site is built with SEO at its foundation — meta tags, schema markup, sitemap, robots.txt, and optimized URLs from the first deploy.

items.title: Responsive Design
items.description: Perfect layout on any device — desktop, tablet, or smartphone — with a mobile-first approach.

items.title: Optimized Conversion
items.description: Strategic CTAs, smart forms, and A/B testing to maximize your site's conversion rate.

items.title: Advanced Security
items.description: HTTPS, XSS and CSRF attack protection, configured security headers, and automatic updates.

items.title: Simplified Maintenance
items.description: Intuitive admin panel so you can update content without technical knowledge.

process.title: Process
process.intro: Our website creation process is structured in clear stages:

steps.title: Briefing & Discovery
steps.description: Initial meeting to understand your business, target audience, competition, and site goals.

steps.title: Wireframing
steps.description: We create detailed wireframes defining information hierarchy and navigation flows.

steps.title: Visual Design
steps.description: High-fidelity design following your brand identity, with desktop and mobile versions for approval.

steps.title: Front-end Development
steps.description: Coding with React/Next.js and Tailwind CSS, ensuring performance, accessibility, and cross-browser compatibility.

steps.title: Integration & Backend
steps.description: Connection to CMS, forms, payment APIs, analytics, and any required systems.

steps.title: Testing & Optimization
steps.description: Usability, performance (Lighthouse), SEO, accessibility (WCAG), and cross-device testing before launch.

steps.title: Deploy & Monitoring
steps.description: Publishing on high-availability infrastructure with global CDN, SSL, and continuous uptime monitoring.

tutorials.title: Guides
tutorials.intro: Learn how to get the most out of your website:

items.title: How to define ideal content for your landing page
items.description: An effective landing page needs strategically positioned elements.
steps: Define your target audience and the main pain point you solve
Create a clear, direct headline that communicates value in under 5 seconds
Add social proof: testimonials, client logos, result numbers
Include a visible CTA with action-oriented text
Use real, high-quality images instead of generic stock photos
Add a FAQ section to address common objections

items.title: Optimizing your site for Google (SEO)
items.description: Understand SEO fundamentals to rank your site organically.
steps: Research relevant keywords using tools like Google Keyword Planner
Optimize meta titles and descriptions for each page
Create original, relevant content of at least 300 words per page
Ensure images have descriptive alt text
Implement structured data (Schema.org) for rich snippets
Monitor performance in Google Search Console regularly

items.title: Managing your site content
items.description: Learn how to update text, images, and information independently.
steps: Access the admin panel with your credentials
Navigate to the content section you want to edit
Make changes in the visual editor (WYSIWYG)
Preview changes before publishing
Click Publish to make changes visible

items.question: How long does it take to build a website?
items.answer: Average timeline is 2 to 4 weeks depending on complexity. Simple landing pages can be ready in 1 week, while complex portals may take up to 6 weeks.

items.question: Will the site be responsive?
items.answer: Yes! All our sites are developed with a mobile-first approach and tested on dozens of devices and browsers.

items.question: Can I edit the content myself?
items.answer: Yes, we deliver an intuitive admin panel so you can update texts, images, and information without needing a developer.

items.question: Is the site SEO-optimized?
items.answer: Absolutely. Technical SEO is fundamental to our process — meta tags, sitemap, schema markup, speed, and friendly URLs are configured from the start.

items.question: Do you offer hosting?
items.answer: Yes, we offer high-performance hosting with global CDN, free SSL, and 24/7 monitoring.

items.question: How much does a website cost?
items.answer: Investment varies by complexity. Landing pages from $500 and complete sites from $1,500. Contact us for a custom quote.

cta.title: Ready for an amazing website?
cta.description: Let's transform your digital presence. Request a personalized proposal and discover how we can help your business grow online.

services.title: Custom Web Systems
services.subtitle: Tailored applications for your business
services.heroDescription: We develop complete web systems to automate processes, manage data, and optimize operations. From CRMs to ERPs, with scalable and secure architecture.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Custom web systems eliminate the limitations of generic software, offering a solution that perfectly adapts to your business's unique processes.
At UniveSIA, we develop robust web applications using modern technologies like React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, focusing on scalability, security, and user experience.
Our systems include complete admin panels, real-time reports, external API integrations, and granular access control by user profiles.
Each system is designed to grow with your business, with modular architecture that allows adding new features without rewriting existing ones.

advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.intro: See why a custom system is the best choice for your business:

items.title: 100% Custom
items.description: Every feature is built to match your exact business processes, with no forced adaptations.

items.title: Scalability
items.description: Architecture ready to grow — from 10 to 10,000 users without performance loss.

items.title: Unlimited Integrations
items.description: Connect with ERPs, payment gateways, third-party APIs, and any system your company uses.

items.title: Data Security
items.description: Encryption, multi-factor authentication, audit logs, and GDPR/LGPD compliance.

items.title: Advanced Reports
items.description: Interactive dashboards with real-time charts and KPIs for data-driven decisions.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.description: Preventive maintenance, security updates, and dedicated technical support post-delivery.

process.title: Process
process.intro: Custom system development follows an agile, iterative methodology:

steps.title: Requirements Gathering
steps.description: Detailed mapping of processes, workflows, and business rules.

steps.title: Architecture & Modeling
steps.description: Technical architecture definition, database modeling, and integration planning.

steps.title: Prototyping
steps.description: Interactive prototypes for interface and flow validation before development.

steps.title: Sprint Development
steps.description: Partial deliveries every 2 weeks for continuous feedback.

steps.title: Automated Testing
steps.description: Unit, integration, and end-to-end test suites for quality assurance.

steps.title: Deploy & Training
steps.description: Production deployment with team training for system usage.

tutorials.title: Guides
tutorials.intro: Guidelines to get the most from your custom system:

items.title: How to plan your web system
items.description: Essential tips for defining the ideal scope.
steps: List all manual processes you want to automate
Identify user profiles that will use the system
Define which reports and KPIs are essential
Map required integrations with existing systems
Prioritize features by impact vs. complexity

items.title: Security best practices for web systems
items.description: Protect your system data with these recommendations.
steps: Implement strong authentication with secure passwords and 2FA
Configure access profiles with granular permissions
Maintain automatic daily data backups
Monitor access logs to detect suspicious activity
Keep all dependencies and frameworks updated

items.question: How long does it take to develop a system?
items.answer: Depends on complexity. Simple systems take 4-8 weeks, complete systems 8-16 weeks. We work with incremental deliveries.

items.question: Can I request changes during development?
items.answer: Yes! We use agile methodology with bi-weekly deliveries and feedback sessions.

items.question: Does the system work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes, all our systems are responsive and work perfectly on any device.

items.question: Do you provide maintenance after delivery?
items.answer: Yes, we offer support and continuous maintenance plans with security updates and improvements.

items.question: Can you migrate data from another system?
items.answer: Absolutely. We handle complete data migration from legacy systems, spreadsheets, or existing databases.

cta.title: Let's build the ideal system for your business?
cta.description: Eliminate manual processes and gain efficiency with a custom web system built for your operation.

services.title: Mobile Apps
services.subtitle: High-performance native and cross-platform apps
services.heroDescription: We develop mobile apps for iOS and Android with native experience, intuitive design, and optimized performance to engage your users.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Mobile is the primary digital interaction channel — over 70% of web traffic comes from mobile devices. A dedicated app is the best way to engage and retain users.
We work with React Native and Flutter for cross-platform development, ensuring a single codebase that works perfectly on both iOS and Android with native performance.
Our apps include push notifications, offline mode, geolocation, camera, in-app payments, and wearable integration.
From concept to store launch (App Store and Google Play), we handle the entire process: design, development, testing, publishing, and post-launch monitoring.

advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.intro: Why invest in a mobile app with UniveSIA:

items.title: Cross-Platform
items.description: Single codebase for iOS and Android, reducing costs and development time by up to 40%.

items.title: Native Performance
items.description: Apps with performance indistinguishable from native, using React Native or Flutter with advanced optimizations.

items.title: Mobile-First UX
items.description: Design specifically for touch interaction, with intuitive gestures and fluid navigation.

items.title: Push Notifications
items.description: Personalized notification system to re-engage users and increase retention.

items.title: Offline Mode
items.description: Essential features available even without internet connection.

items.title: Store Publishing
items.description: We handle the entire App Store and Google Play publishing process, including ASO optimization.

process.title: Process
process.intro: From concept to launch, our process ensures quality at every stage:

steps.title: Ideation & Research
steps.description: Market analysis, user personas, and MVP definition.

steps.title: UX/UI Design
steps.description: Wireframes, interactive prototypes, and interface design following iOS/Android guidelines.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: React Native or Flutter coding with API and backend service integration.

steps.title: Device Testing
steps.description: Testing on dozens of real devices and emulators for compatibility.

steps.title: Beta Testing
steps.description: Beta distribution via TestFlight/Firebase for real user feedback.

steps.title: Launch & ASO
steps.description: Store publishing with screenshot, description, and keyword optimization.

tutorials.title: Guides
tutorials.intro: Guidelines for your mobile app's success:

items.title: How to define your app's MVP
items.description: Tips for launching a focused, efficient app.
steps: List all desired features
Classify each as essential, important, or nice-to-have
Select only essentials for the first version (MVP)
Define success metrics to validate market acceptance
Plan future iterations based on user feedback

items.title: Strategies to increase downloads
items.description: Proven techniques to grow your user base.
steps: Optimize title and description with relevant keywords (ASO)
Create attractive screenshots showing main features
Encourage positive reviews at the right moment
Use deep links to connect marketing campaigns to the app
Implement a referral program within the app

items.question: Native or cross-platform?
items.answer: In most cases, cross-platform (React Native/Flutter) offers the best value with near-native performance and 30-40% development savings.

items.question: How much does an app cost?
items.answer: Simple apps from $4,000, intermediate from $8,000-$20,000, complex apps above $25,000. It all depends on features and integrations.

items.question: Do you publish to the stores?
items.answer: Yes! We handle the entire App Store and Google Play publishing process.

items.question: Does the app work offline?
items.answer: Yes, we implement local cache and smart sync so essential features work without internet.

items.question: How does app maintenance work?
items.answer: We offer monthly plans including security updates, bug fixes, iOS/Android version adaptation, and continuous improvements.

cta.title: Let's build your app?
cta.description: From concept to store publishing, we transform your idea into an app users love.

services.title: Automations & Integrations
services.subtitle: Eliminate repetitive tasks and connect your systems
services.heroDescription: We automate workflows, integrate systems, and eliminate manual tasks to significantly increase your team's productivity.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Companies lose an average of 20% of employee time on manual, repetitive tasks that could be automated. At UniveSIA, we identify and eliminate these bottlenecks.
We use tools like n8n, Zapier, Make, and custom development to create automations that connect your systems, reduce errors, and free your team for strategic activities.
From simple automations like email sending to complex flows involving multiple systems, APIs, and business rules — we have the right solution for every scenario.
Our integrations ensure data flows automatically between your systems, eliminating rework and ensuring information consistency.

advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.intro: Discover how automations can transform your operation:

items.title: Time Savings
items.description: Eliminate hours spent on repetitive tasks — your team focuses on what truly matters.

items.title: Zero Human Errors
items.description: Automations execute tasks with precision, eliminating typos, calculation errors, and oversights.

items.title: Instant Scalability
items.description: Automate once and process thousands of operations without increasing staff.

items.title: Unlimited Integrations
items.description: Connect CRM, ERP, e-commerce, social media, email marketing, and hundreds of other tools.

items.title: 24/7 Monitoring
items.description: Automations work around the clock with automatic alerts in case of failures.

items.title: Quick ROI
items.description: Most automations pay for themselves in under 3 months through time savings and error reduction.

process.title: Process
process.intro: Our process for creating efficient, reliable automations:

steps.title: Process Mapping
steps.description: We document all current processes, identifying bottlenecks and automation opportunities.

steps.title: Prioritization
steps.description: We prioritize automations by business impact vs. implementation complexity.

steps.title: Flow Design
steps.description: We design the automated flow with all conditions, exceptions, and error handling.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: We configure and develop automations using the most suitable tools.

steps.title: Testing & Validation
steps.description: Rigorous testing with real scenarios to ensure everything works perfectly.

steps.title: Continuous Monitoring
steps.description: Active monitoring with dashboards and alerts for continuous operation.

tutorials.title: Guides
tutorials.intro: Understand how automations can revolutionize your business:

items.title: Identifying automation opportunities
items.description: Learn to find processes that can be automated.
steps: List all repetitive tasks for a week
Calculate time spent on each manual task per month
Identify tasks that follow clear, predictable rules
Prioritize those that consume the most time and are error-prone
Estimate automation ROI (time saved × cost/hour)

items.title: How an n8n automation works
items.description: Learn the basic flow of a professional automation.
steps: Define the trigger — the event that starts the automation
Configure actions to be executed automatically
Add conditions and filters for specific scenarios
Implement error handling and fallbacks
Enable monitoring and alerts to track execution

items.question: What tasks can be automated?
items.answer: Virtually any repetitive task: email sending, report generation, spreadsheet updates, notifications, data sync, order processing, and more.

items.question: Do I need to change my current systems?
items.answer: No! Our automations integrate with your existing systems, creating bridges without replacing any tools.

items.question: Can automations fail?
items.answer: We implement robust error handling, automatic retries, and instant alerts. In case of failure, you're notified and the automation retries automatically.

items.question: What's the implementation timeline?
items.answer: Simple automations are ready in 1-3 days. Complex flows with multiple integrations may take 1-3 weeks.

cta.title: Ready to automate your business?
cta.description: Eliminate manual tasks and boost productivity. Let's map the best automation opportunities for your company.

services.title: Technical Consulting
services.subtitle: Expert guidance for technology decisions
services.heroDescription: We offer consulting in software architecture, code review, system migration, performance optimization, and technology strategy for companies.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Wrong technology decisions can cost months of development and thousands of dollars. Our technical consulting helps your company make informed, strategic choices.
Our team of experts brings experience from dozens of projects to analyze your current infrastructure, identify improvement areas, and create a technology evolution roadmap.
We offer from one-time code review sessions to continuous CTO-as-a-Service support, adapting involvement to your business needs.
Every recommendation is backed by data, market benchmarks, and industry best practices.

advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.intro: How our consulting adds value to your business:

items.title: Impartial View
items.description: Objective analysis of your infrastructure and tech stack, without vendor bias.

items.title: Resource Savings
items.description: Avoid investing in inadequate technologies and reduce operational costs.

items.title: Faster Delivery
items.description: Identify development bottlenecks and implement practices that accelerate delivery.

items.title: Reinforced Security
items.description: Complete security audit with vulnerability identification and mitigation plan.

items.title: Team Upskilling
items.description: Workshops and technical mentoring to level up your development team.

items.title: Strategic Roadmap
items.description: Technology evolution plan aligned with short, medium, and long-term business goals.

steps.title: Initial Diagnosis
steps.description: Complete analysis of infrastructure, codebase, processes, and team.

steps.title: Problem Identification
steps.description: Detailed mapping of issues, risks, and improvement opportunities.

steps.title: Recommendations Report
steps.description: Detailed document with analysis, prioritized recommendations, and impact estimates.

steps.title: Action Plan
steps.description: Implementation roadmap with timeline, responsibilities, and success metrics.

steps.title: Follow-up
steps.description: Support during recommendations implementation with follow-up meetings.

tutorials.title: Guides
tutorials.intro: Essential knowledge for better technology decisions:

items.title: When to hire technical consulting
items.description: Signs your company needs expert guidance.
steps: Deliveries are getting slower without apparent cause
The team can't keep up with feature demand
Infrastructure costs are growing disproportionally
There are doubts about which technology or architecture to adopt
Current system has frequent performance or stability issues

items.title: How to prepare for a consulting engagement
items.description: Maximize consulting value with these preparations.
steps: Document the main technical challenges your company faces
Prepare access to code repository and infrastructure
List current performance and availability metrics
Identify stakeholders who will participate in the process
Define objectives and expectations for the consulting

items.question: What's the difference between one-time and ongoing consulting?
items.answer: One-time consulting solves a specific need (e.g., code review, tech choice). Ongoing (CTO-as-a-Service) offers regular accompaniment with weekly meetings and continuous support.

items.question: Do you consult on any technology?
items.answer: We specialize in web (React, Node.js, Python), mobile (React Native, Flutter), cloud (AWS, GCP), and DevOps.

items.question: How much does consulting cost?
items.answer: One-time sessions from $150/hour. Monthly packages from $1,500/month.

items.question: Does consulting include implementation?
items.answer: Consulting focuses on analysis and recommendations. Implementation can be done as a separate project if desired.

cta.title: Need technology guidance?
cta.description: Schedule a conversation with our experts and discover how we can help your company make smarter technology decisions.

services.title: Artificial Intelligence
services.subtitle: Intelligent solutions with cutting-edge AI
services.heroDescription: We implement chatbots, virtual assistants, predictive analytics, and intelligent automation with language models (LLMs) and computer vision.

overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Artificial Intelligence has moved beyond science fiction to become an essential tool for competitive businesses. At UniveSIA, we make AI accessible and practical.
We implement solutions from customer service chatbots to complex predictive analytics, document processing, and computer vision systems.
We work with the most advanced models (GPT, Gemini, Claude) and open-source models for scenarios requiring complete data privacy.
Each AI solution is customized for your business context, trained with your data, and integrated into your existing systems for maximum impact.

advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.intro: How AI can revolutionize your business:

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.description: Intelligent chatbots that serve customers anytime, in any language, with human-quality responses.

items.title: Predictive Analytics
items.description: Predict trends, demands, and customer behaviors using machine learning on your data.

items.title: Document Processing
items.description: Extract, classify, and process information from documents, contracts, and forms automatically.

items.title: Personalization at Scale
items.description: Deliver personalized experiences for each customer using AI-based recommendations.

items.title: Computer Vision
items.description: Image and video analysis for quality control, security, and pattern recognition.

items.title: Intelligent Automation
items.description: Unlike rule-based automations, AI makes decisions in ambiguous, complex scenarios.

process.title: Process
process.intro: How we implement AI solutions in your business:

steps.title: Opportunity Identification
steps.description: We map processes where AI can generate the most business impact.

steps.title: Data Collection & Preparation
steps.description: We organize and clean the data needed to train AI models.

steps.title: Model Selection
steps.description: We select the most suitable AI model — proprietary or open-source — for each case.

steps.title: Customization & Training
steps.description: Model fine-tuning with your business-specific data for maximum accuracy.

steps.title: Integration
steps.description: We connect the AI solution to your systems (CRM, website, app, WhatsApp, etc.).

steps.title: Monitoring & Improvement
steps.description: Continuous performance monitoring with refinement based on real feedback.

tutorials.title: Guides
tutorials.intro: Understand how AI can be applied in your context:

items.title: How an AI chatbot can help your business
items.description: Understand the benefits and possibilities of an intelligent chatbot.
steps: Identify your customers' most frequent questions
Prepare a knowledge base about products and services
Define the chatbot's tone of voice and personality
Choose service channels (website, WhatsApp, Instagram)
Monitor conversations and feed the bot with new information regularly

items.title: AI for business data analysis
items.description: Discover hidden insights in your company's data.
steps: Identify your company's data sources (CRM, sales, finance)
Define which business questions you want to answer with data
Organize and clean historical data (minimum 6 months)
Choose analysis type: classification, prediction, or clustering
Implement dashboards to visualize AI-generated insights

items.question: Do I need a lot of data to use AI?
items.answer: Depends on the solution. LLM chatbots work well with a text knowledge base. Predictive analytics needs historical data — usually at least 6 months.

items.question: Will AI replace my employees?
items.answer: AI is a tool to empower your team, not replace it. It handles repetitive, low-value tasks so employees can focus on strategic work.

items.question: Is data kept secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We implement all security and privacy measures, including encryption, access control, and GDPR compliance. For sensitive cases, we use locally-running models.

items.question: How much does AI implementation cost?
items.answer: Simple chatbots from $1,500. Predictive analytics from $4,000-$15,000. Computer vision projects from $6,000. Each case is quoted individually.

items.question: How long does implementation take?
items.answer: Chatbots 2-4 weeks. Predictive analytics 4-8 weeks. Computer vision 6-12 weeks.

cta.title: Ready to implement AI in your business?
cta.description: Discover how artificial intelligence can transform your processes, reduce costs, and create new revenue opportunities.
